coffee-pub-regent.headingH1AISettings-Hint: Settings for Regent AI tools and worksheet defaults.
coffee-pub-regent.openAIMacro-Hint: Optional: Macro to open the Regent AI window.
coffee-pub-regent.openAIProjectId-Hint: Optional project ID for cost tracking.
coffee-pub-regent.openAIContextLength-Hint: Number of prior messages to send (0 = no history).
coffee-pub-regent.chatCardTheme-Hint: Theme for Regent messages sent to chat (Blacksmith card styles).
coffee-pub-regent.defaultJournalPageTitle-Hint: Title that should be used when creating new journal pages. (optional)
coffee-pub-regent.defaultCampaignRealm-Hint: The broad world or plane of existence, encompassing vast continents, cultures, and histories (e.g. Faerun, Eberron, etc.).
coffee-pub-regent.defaultCampaignRegion-Hint: A defined area within a realm, such as a kingdom, territory, or geographic expanse.
coffee-pub-regent.defaultCampaignSite-Hint: A specific location or structure within a region like a building, mine, or stronghold.
coffee-pub-regent.defaultCampaignArea-Hint: A distinct part of a site like a room, chamber, street, or location where scenes or encounters occur.
